title: myosotis palustris var. dumortieri
intro: Myosotis palustris var. dumortieri, also known as the alpine forget-me-not or blue forget-me-not, is a variety of flowering plant in the borage family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects. The health benefits associated with Myosotis palustris var. dumortieri include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce swelling, and support urinary health. It can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and optimal dosing.
